ui_only_login_page_change.purpose: Fast validation for login UI, copy, and presentation changes.

login_api_change.purpose: Smoke plus core generated login cases for API or validation changes.

password_or_recovery_change.purpose: Recovery, password validation, reset-token, and enumeration checks.

token_or_session_change.purpose: Access-token, refresh-token, cookie, and session lifecycle checks.

otp_mfa_change.purpose: OTP, MFA bypass, recovery, and suspicious-device checks.

role_permission_change.purpose: Full RBAC matrix and forbidden route testing.

payment_security_sensitive_auth_change.purpose: Auth security, token, session, RBAC, rate-limit, and payment boundary checks.

major_production_auth_release.purpose: Critical generated matrix before major releases.

emergency_security_patch.purpose: Risk-targeted security first, then broad generated regression.

claim: The architecture supports approximately 1.04 billion logical authentication/security combinations and executes optimized risk-based subsets depending on the change type.
